data.name: IDS_ERROR_NETWORK_EXIT
data.value: A network error has occurred. Exiting to Main Menu.

data.name: IDS_CHAT_RESTRICTION_UGC
data.value: Online service is disabled on your Sony Entertainment Network account due to chat restrictions.

data.name: IDS_CONTENT_RESTRICTION
data.value: Online service is disabled on your Sony Entertainment Network account due to parental control settings.

data.name: IDS_ERROR_PSN_SIGN_OUT
data.value: You have been signed out from the "PSN". Online features of the game will not be available until you sign back into the "PSN".

data.name: IDS_ERROR_PSN_SIGN_OUT_EXIT
data.value: You have been signed out from the "PSN". Online features of the game will not be available until you sign back into the "PSN". Exiting to Main Menu.

data.name: IDS_PLAYER_LIST_TITLE
data.value: Choose user for player %d (or cancel to play as guest)

data.name: IDS_CORRUPT_OPTIONS
data.value: Your Options file is corrupt and needs to be deleted.

data.name: IDS_CORRUPT_SAVECACHE
data.value: Your Save Cache file is corrupt and needs to be deleted.

data.name: IDS_SAVEDATA_COPIED_TEXT
data.value: Trophies will be disabled because this save belongs to another user.

data.name: IDS_FATAL_TROPHY_ERROR
data.value: Fatal error: Trophy Initialization failed. Please exit game.

data.name: IDS_CONTROLER_DISCONNECT_TEXT
data.value: Your controller has been disconnected. Please reconnect the controller.

data.name: IDS_CONTENT_RESTRICTION_MULTIPLAYER
data.value: Online service is disabled on your Sony Entertainment Network account due to parental control settings for one of your local players.

data.name: IDS_CONTENT_RESTRICTION_PATCH_AVAILABLE
data.value: Online features are disabled due to a game update being available.

data.name: IDS_NO_DLCCATEGORIES
data.value: There are no downloadable content offers available for this title at the moment.

data.name: IDS_INVITATION_BODY
data.value: Please come and play a game of Minecraft: PlayStation®Vita Edition!
